turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you for calling. My name is Sarah. How can I help you?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Hi Sarah, I just wanted to update the email address on my account.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Sure, I can help with that. Let me update it for you right now.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: All set. It has been updated. Is there anything else I can do?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: No, that is all. Have a great day.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You too. Thank you for calling.
